task_completion.description: Verify the Dell Docking Station and HP Monitor Stand were created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Snipe-IT Accessories list view. You should see entries for 'Dell USB-C Docking Station WD19S' and 'HP E24 G5 Monitor Stand'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Lenovo Keyboard, Lenovo Mouse, and Poly Headset were created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Snipe-IT Accessories list view. You should see entries for 'Lenovo Professional Wireless Keyboard', 'Lenovo Professional Wireless Mouse', and 'Poly Voyager Focus 2 Headset'.

task_completion.description: Verify the category, total quantities, and minimum quantities are correct for all 5 accessories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Accessories list, check the columns for Category ('Computer Peripherals'), Total, and Min. QTY. Dell should be 6/2, HP should be 8/3, Lenovo Keyboard should be 10/3, Lenovo Mouse should be 10/3, and Poly Headset should be 5/2.

task_completion.description: Verify one of each accessory was checked out to Maria Santos (msantos).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for checkout success messages mentioning Maria Santos, her user profile showing the 5 accessories, or the accessory detail pages showing a checkout to her.

task_completion.description: Verify one of each accessory was checked out to James Liu (jliu).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for checkout success messages mentioning James Liu, his user profile showing the 5 accessories, or the accessory detail pages showing a checkout to him.

task_completion.description: Verify one of each accessory was checked out to Aisha Patel (apatel) and final available quantities reflect all 3 checkouts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for checkout success messages for Aisha Patel. Alternatively, look at the main Accessories list: the 'Avail' (Available) column should be exactly 3 less than the Total Qty for each item (Dell Avail: 3, HP Avail: 5, Lenovo KB Avail: 7, Lenovo Mouse Avail: 7, Poly Avail: 2).

integrity.description: The agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to create and checkout accessories.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Snipe-IT web application in a browser, filling out forms, and clicking buttons, rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent entered the data into the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the accessory creation forms and checkout modals being actively filled out in the Snipe-IT interface.

integrity.description: The results appear to come from genuine software interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer tools open modifying the DOM to fake success messages or table data.
